description_long: This is a tall, rectangular green filing cabinet with a slightly tapered body and a flat, black lid that can be opened. The cabinet features a recessed handle on the front for easy access and maneuverability. Two black wheels are visible at the base on one side, suggesting it is designed to be mobile. The lid appears to be hinged at the back, allowing it to swing open for depositing or retrieving contents. The surface is smooth and matte, with a robust, utilitarian appearance suitable for outdoor or semi-outdoor environments. The overall design is simple and functional, with no visible decorative elements.
description: A tall, green, mobile filing cabinet with a black hinged lid, recessed handle, and wheels for easy movement. Its smooth, matte finish and utilitarian design make it suitable for urban or industrial settings.
description_view_0: Front view showing the recessed handle and the open top of the cabinet.
description_view_1: Side view revealing one of the black wheels at the base and the partially open black lid.
description_view_2: Rear view dominated by the large, flat black lid and the two wheels at the bottom.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with the other wheel visible and the lid partially open.
